varieties.name: Dark Green Italian Flat Leaf 🏆
varieties.traits: Flat, deeply cut dark green leaves on tall, sturdy stems (12-18 inches). Vigorous growth habit.
varieties.yield_notes: High productivity. Continuous harvest possible. 70-80 days to maturity.

varieties.name: Gigante di Napoli (Giant of Naples) 🏆
varieties.traits: Very large, smooth flat leaves (2-2.5 inches long). Vigorous, tall plants (30-50cm). Dark green foliage.
varieties.yield_notes: Exceptionally productive. Can be harvested year-round. Restaurant-quality yields.
varieties.availability: Seeds of Italy, specialty Italian seed suppliers, online Australian retailers.

varieties.name: Gigante d'Italia (Giant of Italy) 🏆
varieties.traits: Large flat leaves (2 inches across), 2-3 feet wide plants. Aromatic foliage. Robust growth.
varieties.yield_notes: Very high yields. Rapid growth. Continuous harvest throughout season.
varieties.availability: Grow Italian, Redwood City Seeds, Australian specialty seed companies.

varieties.name: Italian Plain Leaf (Common Italian)
varieties.traits: Flat, dark green leaves resembling wild parsley. Medium-sized plants (12-15 inches). Upright growth.
varieties.yield_notes: Good productivity. Fast-growing. 75 days to maturity.
varieties.availability: Widely available in humid subtropical climates: Bunnings, Mitre 10, The Seed Collection, local nurseries.

varieties.name: Italian Dark Green
varieties.traits: Deep forest-green, highly dissected leaves. Sturdy stems. Upright plants that resist bolting. Compact growth.
varieties.yield_notes: High yields. Good regrowth after cutting. 70 days maturity.
varieties.availability: Deep Harvest Farm, specialty seed companies, Australian organic suppliers.

varieties.name: Plain (Single Leaf) Parsley
varieties.origin: Greece and Italy - grows wild in rocks
varieties.traits: Smooth dark green leaves. Smaller than Italian Giant. Less uniform growth. Simple leaf structure.
varieties.yield_notes: Good yields. 75 days to maturity. Moderate productivity.

varieties.name: Sweet Italian
varieties.traits: Deep green flat leaves. Medium-sized plants. Classic Italian appearance.
varieties.yield_notes: Good productivity. Steady yields throughout season.
varieties.availability: Johnny's Selected Seeds, Australian seed retailers.

varieties.name: Pinocchio
varieties.origin: Developed by Daehnfeldt/SeedWorks for commercial growers
varieties.traits: Plain, broad leaves - larger than most parsley. Very vigorous plants. Medium-early maturity.
varieties.yield_notes: Very high yields. Excellent recovery and regrowth. Professional-grade productivity.
varieties.availability: Commercial seed suppliers, Meyer Seed International.

varieties.name: Geppetto
varieties.traits: Large, glossy dark-green leaves. Italian parsley type. Attractive appearance.
varieties.yield_notes: Excellent recovery and regrowth. High commercial yields. 2005 variety.

varieties.name: Triple Moss Curled (Triple Curled) 🏆
varieties.traits: Densely curled, bright green leaves. Resembles moss. Very ornamental. Compact plants (10-12 inches). Feathery texture.
varieties.yield_notes: High yields. Continuous harvest. 50-60 days to maturity. Heat-tolerant variety.

varieties.name: Forest Green 🏆
varieties.traits: Double and triple curled deep green leaves. Upright foliage. Short, strong stems. 8-12 inches tall. Compact growth.
varieties.yield_notes: Good yields. Bunches well. 75-80 days. Holds well in heat without discoloration.
varieties.availability: Richters, Johnny's Seeds, Southern Exposure, Harris Seeds, Reimer Seeds, widely available in Australia.

varieties.name: Champion Moss Curled 🏆
varieties.traits: Rich green, closely curled foliage. Compact habit (1.5 feet/45cm). Decorative appearance.
varieties.yield_notes: Good yields. 70-85 days to maturity. Reliable production.

varieties.name: Extra Curled Dwarf
varieties.traits: Finely cut, very curly dark green leaves. Very compact plants (10 inches). Moss-like appearance. Dense growth.
varieties.yield_notes: Good yields for size. 80 days to maturity. Container-friendly productivity.

varieties.name: Paramount 🏆
varieties.origin: Ferry-Morse Seed Co., 1936 - selection from Extra Triple Curled
varieties.traits: Dwarfer and darker green than Extra Triple Curled. Triple curled leaves. Uniform appearance. 85 days.
varieties.yield_notes: Adapts well. Good productivity. Long-established variety.
varieties.availability: Eden Brothers, Holmes Seed Co., heritage seed suppliers.

varieties.name: Decorator
varieties.origin: Abbott and Cobb - selection from Paramount
varieties.traits: Extremely tight curl. Extra dark-green color. Thick leaves and stems. Open-pollinated.
varieties.yield_notes: Good yields. Professional quality. 1977 introduction.

varieties.name: Bravour 🏆
varieties.origin: Award-winning variety - RHS Award of Garden Merit
varieties.traits: Dark green, finely curled leaves. Very hardy. Compact plants. Masses of tightly curled foliage.
varieties.yield_notes: High yield of early dark green leaves. Long-lived and productive. Excellent winter supply.
varieties.availability: Tozer Seeds, Kings Seeds, Groseeds UK, specialty suppliers.

varieties.name: Decora
varieties.traits: Dark green curled leaves. Heat-tolerant variety. Uniform growth. 80 days maturity.
varieties.yield_notes: More productive than Triple Curled. Good commercial yields.
varieties.availability: Twilley Seeds, commercial suppliers.

varieties.name: Banquet
varieties.traits: Tightly curled dark green leaves. Enhanced color when grown in cool conditions. Excellent for overwintering.
varieties.yield_notes: Good yields. 75-80 days maturity.
varieties.availability: Harris Seeds, specialty suppliers.

varieties.name: Pagoda
varieties.traits: Moss curled leaves. Long-stemmed (85 days). Attractive appearance.
varieties.yield_notes: Good productivity. Long stems for bunching.
varieties.availability: Bejo Seeds, commercial suppliers.

varieties.name: Petra
varieties.traits: Moss curled parsley. Strong, long stems. Densely curled dark green leaves.
varieties.yield_notes: Good regrowth after cutting. Reliable yields.
varieties.availability: Bejo Seeds, professional seed suppliers.

varieties.name: Curlina
varieties.traits: Rich green color. Globular growth habit. Compact form.
varieties.yield_notes: Good yields for containers. Bred for container production.
varieties.availability: Seeds-by-Size, specialty suppliers.

varieties.name: Frisca
varieties.traits: Dense, extra curly leaves. Vigorous growth. Fine flavor. 75 days.
varieties.yield_notes: Vigorous yields. Mildew resistant.
varieties.availability: Shepherd's Garden Seeds, specialty suppliers.

varieties.name: Exotica
varieties.traits: Curled foliage. Good appearance.
varieties.yield_notes: Reliable yields.
varieties.availability: Seeds-by-Size, specialty retailers.

varieties.name: Green River
varieties.traits: Medium green, double-curled. Very curly leaves. Good early branching.
varieties.yield_notes: Slow bolter. Reliable yields.
varieties.availability: Richters, Nichols Garden Nursery, specialty suppliers.

varieties.name: Moss Curled (various strains) 🏆
varieties.traits: Densely curled leaves. Ruffled appearance. Various strains (Evergreen, 2-Krausa, 2-Petra).
varieties.yield_notes: Good yields. Reliable production.

varieties.name: Extra Triple Curled
varieties.traits: Compact, densely curled dark green leaves. Very ornamental.
varieties.yield_notes: Productive. Reliable yields.

varieties.name: Hamburg Rooted (Hamburg Turnip-Rooted) 🏆
varieties.traits: 8-10 inch long parsnip-like white roots (up to 2 inches diameter). Flat, deeply cut edible leaves. Carrot-like taproot.
varieties.yield_notes: Good root yields. 90 days to maturity. Dual-purpose harvest - leaves and roots.
varieties.availability: Victory Seeds, The Seed Collection Australia, Mary's Heirloom Seeds, widely available.

varieties.name: Berliner (Hamburg Root Parsley) 🏆
varieties.origin: Traditional Flemish variety - on Slow Food Ark of Taste (endangered)
varieties.traits: 12-18cm long white fragrant roots. Similar to elongated carrots. Flat leaves with strong flavor. Yellow-green flowers.
varieties.yield_notes: Moderate yields. Endangered variety. Traditional waterzooi ingredient (Belgian soup).
varieties.availability: Franchi Seeds (Seeds of Italy), specialty European suppliers.

varieties.name: Hamburg Half Long
varieties.traits: Shorter, stubbier roots than standard Hamburg. More compact root system.
varieties.yield_notes: Better tolerance of poor soil. Good yields for difficult conditions.
varieties.availability: Specialty seed suppliers.

varieties.name: Fakir
varieties.traits: Parsnip-shaped roots. Dark green plain leaf tops.
varieties.yield_notes: High yields. Commercial variety.

varieties.name: Mitsuba (Japanese Parsley)
varieties.traits: Three large leaflets (mitsuba = three leaves). Much larger than regular parsley. Green to deep red foliage. Can use stems.
varieties.yield_notes: Good yields. Perennial in suitable climates.
varieties.availability: Specialty Asian seed suppliers, Japanese seed companies.

varieties.name: Mitsuba 'Bronze'
varieties.traits: Deep red to bronze colored foliage. Ornamental appearance. Large leaflets.
varieties.yield_notes: Hardy and perennial. Good productivity.

varieties.name: Mitsuba 'Purpurascens'
varieties.traits: Deep red foliage. Special ornamental appearance. Attractive in pots and beds.
varieties.yield_notes: Good yields. Ornamental value.

varieties.name: Sea Parsley (Apium prostratum) 🌏
varieties.origin: Native Australian - grows wild on coasts
varieties.traits: Varies by variety: Headland Sea Parsley (prostrate, broad leaves) and Mangrove Sea Parsley (upright, narrower leaves). Grows on dunes, headlands, swamps.
varieties.yield_notes: Self-seeds readily. Semi-perennial with robust carrot-like taproot. Annual with perennial capacity.
varieties.availability: Wild harvesting from coastal areas, native plant nurseries, Australian native seed suppliers.

varieties.name: Dark Green Italian Flat Leaf 🏆
varieties.traits: Flat, dark green leaves. Tall, sturdy stems. Vigorous plants.
varieties.yield_notes: High yields. Continuous harvest.

varieties.name: Gigante di Napoli 🏆
varieties.traits: Very large smooth leaves. Vigorous tall plants. Dark green.
varieties.yield_notes: Very productive. Year-round potential in suitable conditions.
varieties.availability: Seeds of Italy (international shipping), specialty suppliers.

varieties.name: Gigante d'Italia 🏆
varieties.traits: Large flat leaves. 2-3 feet plants. Robust growth.
varieties.yield_notes: High yields. Rapid growth.

varieties.name: Italian Plain Leaf
varieties.traits: Standard flat green leaves. Medium plants. Upright growth.
varieties.yield_notes: Good productivity. 75 days.

varieties.name: Italian Dark Green
varieties.traits: Deep green dissected leaves. Sturdy stems. Bolt-resistant.
varieties.yield_notes: High yields. Good regrowth.

varieties.name: Sweet Italian
varieties.traits: Deep green flat leaves. Medium plants.
varieties.yield_notes: Good yields.
varieties.availability: Seed suppliers, online retailers.

varieties.name: Plain (Single Leaf)
varieties.traits: Smooth dark green leaves. Smaller plants. Simple structure.
varieties.yield_notes: Moderate yields. 75 days.

varieties.name: Forest Green 🏆
varieties.traits: Double/triple curled deep green. Upright foliage. Compact (8-12 inches).
varieties.yield_notes: Heat and drought tolerant. Holds color in heat.
varieties.availability: International seed suppliers, specialty retailers.

varieties.name: Triple Moss Curled 🏆
varieties.traits: Densely curled moss-like leaves. Compact plants.
varieties.yield_notes: Heat-tolerant for curly type. Good yields.

varieties.name: Champion Moss Curled 🏆
varieties.traits: Curled green foliage. Compact. Decorative.
varieties.yield_notes: Drought-tolerant but not heat-adapted.
varieties.availability: Heritage seed suppliers.

varieties.name: Decorator
varieties.traits: Extra dark green. Extremely tight curl. Thick leaves.
varieties.yield_notes: Professional quality.

varieties.name: Decora
varieties.traits: Dark green curled. Uniform. 80 days.
varieties.yield_notes: Productive.
varieties.availability: Commercial seed suppliers.

varieties.name: Hamburg Rooted 🏆
varieties.traits: 8-10 inch parsnip-like roots. Flat leaves.
varieties.yield_notes: 90 days. Dual harvest.
varieties.availability: International suppliers (not recommended for tropical monsoon climates).

varieties.name: Mitsuba (Japanese Parsley)
varieties.traits: Large three-leaflet structure. Green to red. Perennial.
varieties.yield_notes: Perennial yields.
varieties.availability: Specialty Asian suppliers, international retailers.

varieties.name: Coriander (Cilantro) 🌏
varieties.origin: Traditional tropical monsoon climates herb - NOT PARSLEY but commonly substituted
varieties.traits: Similar appearance to flat-leaf parsley. Feathery leaves. Annual herb.
varieties.yield_notes: Excellent yields in tropical monsoon climates. Fast-growing.
varieties.availability: Widely available throughout tropical monsoon climates - every nursery, spice shop, agricultural store.
